summary: CRITICAL: Frontend application is completely inaccessible. The public URL (https://demobackend.emergentagent.com) is routing all requests to the backend FastAPI server instead of the frontend React application. The entire application cannot be tested as the UI is not loading.

backend_issues.notes: Backend is running correctly on port 8001 and responding to requests. However, it's receiving ALL traffic including frontend routes, which it cannot handle.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend application is completely inaccessible via public URL
integration_issues.root_cause: Ingress/routing misconfiguration - all requests are being routed to backend (port 8001) instead of frontend (port 3000)
integration_issues.evidence: Public URL returns JSON error: {"error":"Route not found"} from FastAPI backend for all routes including root path

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix ingress/routing configuration. The public URL (https://demobackend.emergentagent.com) must route frontend requests (/, /login, /offers, etc.) to port 3000 (frontend) and only /api/* requests to port 8001 (backend). Currently ALL requests are going to the backend FastAPI server. Frontend is running correctly on port 3000 internally but is not accessible via the public URL. This is a deployment/infrastructure issue, not a code issue.
